67.name: Crossroads
67.description: You stand just south of the southernmost end of the Concourse of Air. Looking north, you can see the Concourse leading toward the city of Mareldja. A country road heads east and the Coast road leads west. The sky turns crimson from the setting sun. You are getting thirsty.

68.name: Country Road
68.description: You are moving along a wide gravel road. Trees line both sides, their branches meeting high over your head. The road continues east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Country Road You have come upon a bit of an intersection. The narrow trail to the south is rutted and uneven; suited for small carts at best. A large, walled building can be seen through the trees to the northeast. The road continues east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Country Road As you look to the north you notice a large country estate, surrounded by a high wall. There is a gate in the wall directly north of you but you also notice that the gate is flanked by a stout looking gatehouse; a likely place for guards. Breathing deeply, you run... Country Road You stand at a crossroad. A wide and well maintained country road heads off to the west, while a narrower road heads east. A narrow cart-path climbs up a steep embankment and the dilapidated ruin of an old cobbled road heads off to the south. Breathing deeply, you run... Among the Trees Well-maintained walnut and pecan trees grow in ordered and spacious rows along either side of the road. The forest, of beech, elm, and yew, borders the grove to the east, and a crossroads near a manor house lies to the west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest Light from the Sun, Moon, and Stars is gently filtered by leaves high above your head. The trees are widely spaced here, and there is little underbrush. The detritus from a thousand autumns blankets the wide ways between the trees. The road continues to the east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest Birch trees predominate in this section of forest. The underbrush is crossed with game trails on either side. To the west the trees open up and assume the semblance of a park, but the east leads to a densely packed section of old and brooding trees. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest The brooding trees gather thickly here. They crowd into the road and lean over pensively. Their hunkering limbs push any and all light from above. The dim road traverses the gloom to the east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest This is the kind of forest that has existed since the beginning of time. Thick moss drips with moisture on every branch, and strange insects and fungi cover the ground and trunks of the place. The dimness gives the place a watchful air, as if the whole living thing were waiting for some great rupture in the fabric of the world. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest The forest floor is jagged and broken here. The thick roots of the fat tree- trunks encircle mossy boulders and twist into rock-filled hillocks. You can travel east or west.

69.name: Country Road
69.description: You have come upon a bit of an intersection. The narrow trail to the south is rutted and uneven; suited for small carts at best. A large, walled building can be seen through the trees to the northeast. The road continues east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Country Road You are moving along a wide gravel road. Trees line both sides, their branches meeting high over your head. The road continues east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Crossroads You stand just south of the southernmost end of the Concourse of Air. Looking north, you can see the Concourse leading toward the city of Mareldja. A country road heads east and the Coast road leads west. Breathing deeply, you run... Coast Road The Coast Road is a short dirt track that leads from the Crossroads, straight west to the ocean. The ruts and potholes bear mute testimony to the lack of maintenance this road receives. The Crossroads are to your east, Coast Road continues to the west. A small field of rich green rests to the south.

70.name: Country Road
70.description: As you look to the north you notice a large country estate, surrounded by a high wall. There is a gate in the wall directly north of you but you also notice that the gate is flanked by a stout looking gatehouse; a likely place for guards. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

71.name: Country Road
71.description: You stand at a crossroad. A wide and well maintained country road heads off to the west, while a narrower road heads east. A narrow cart-path climbs up a steep embankment and the dilapidated ruin of an old cobbled road heads off to the south. Breathing deeply, you run... Among the Trees Well-maintained walnut and pecan trees grow in ordered and spacious rows along either side of the road. The forest, of beech, elm, and yew, borders the grove to the east, and a crossroads near a manor house lies to the west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest Light from the Sun, Moon, and Stars is gently filtered by leaves high above your head. The trees are widely spaced here, and there is little underbrush. The detritus from a thousand autumns blankets the wide ways between the trees. The road continues to the east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest Birch trees predominate in this section of forest. The underbrush is crossed with game trails on either side. To the west the trees open up and assume the semblance of a park, but the east leads to a densely packed section of old and brooding trees. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest The brooding trees gather thickly here. They crowd into the road and lean over pensively. Their hunkering limbs push any and all light from above. The dim road traverses the gloom to the east and west. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest This is the kind of forest that has existed since the beginning of time. Thick moss drips with moisture on every branch, and strange insects and fungi cover the ground and trunks of the place. The dimness gives the place a watchful air, as if the whole living thing were waiting for some great rupture in the fabric of the world. Breathing deeply, you run... Road Through the Forest The forest floor is jagged and broken here. The thick roots of the fat tree- trunks encircle mossy boulders and twist into rock-filled hillocks. You can travel east or west. Breathing deeply, you run... The Cut You find yourself on a narrow road skirting the edge of a deep cut in the earth. The road travels away from this gorge to the west into a wooded area and it skirts the gorge to the south. A footpath leads down into the canyon. You can't go that way. You can't go that way. You can't go that way. You can't go that way.

1296.name: Coast Road
1296.description: You have come to the western end of Coast Road. A steep trail leads down to a small rocky shelf at the edge of the sea. A narrow trail through the woods is to the south and Coast Road continues east.

543.name: Coast Road
543.description: The Coast Road is a short dirt track that leads from the Crossroads, straight west to the ocean. The ruts and potholes bear mute testimony to the lack of maintenance this road receives. The Crossroads are to your east, Coast Road continues to the west. A small field of rich green rests to the south.
